discoveries.description: Hey!You wanna have the AI in GTA 5 to be more spicy, tactical & realistic? You are not interested in constant gun and run that insults your intelligence and are but more likely to actually fight your way through enemies?  In a life where interactions and combat feal like they mean something? This mods overhauls ingame Combat and AI Balance. Combat will now feel and be more immersive, punishing, tactical and intense!The decision between tak...

sources.title: Improved Combat AI
sources.description: So if you're viewing this right now you know why, AI in singleplayer doesn't offer a sufficient challenge when it comes to fights. This mod focuses on improving AI. The mod changes pre-existing code in the game files so you don't need to mess around with issues on scripts. Detailed Improvements listed below.Universal Changes: Restrictions for peds to charge your position have been laxed. Peds can now charge you in groups maximum of 3, they wil...
